headline: PPG Industries Tests Laser Cured Powder Coatings For Efficiency And Growth
summary: PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) has partnered with IPG Photonics and Whirlpool to bring laser curing systems for powder coatings to market. PPG has installed a pilot line using IPG Photonics technology, with pilot trials underway involving major customers. The collaboration focuses on efficiency, sustainability, and lower environmental impact in industrial coating processes. PPG Industries is a global supplier of paints, coatings, and specialty materials, so this move into laser cured powder...
